song.title: In Spirit, In The Church
song.lyrics: [v1] In spirit, in the church we see The high estate we're destined for. It's higher, vaster, more profound Than anything we've seen before. [v2] It's not a view in doctrine bare But an unveiling of the Christ. He's marvelous and far beyond Our mental thought or power to share. [v3] He's rich, unlimited, profound, Immeasurable, and marvelous. Yet 'tis a greater wonder still He needs heirs of salvation—us. [v4] God has accomplished many things— He's planned, created, and brought forth. The Son is now appointed Heir, Administrator of God's worth. [v5] But in th' economy of God There is not one, but many sons. One is the firstborn Son of God With many other living ones. [v6] Christ will inherit all God's things, And we're the heirs of God with Christ. We're growing now to be matured; As heirs we'll soon be legalized. [v7] We're joint-heirs with the firstborn Son, Inheriting the universe. We're in this corporation vast— All partners of Christ and the church. [v8] In spirit, in the church, we see Our calling of unrivaled worth. We're destined, not to go to heaven. We're destined to be kings on earth. [v9] We're paupers, yet we're glorious kings. Inheriting the kingdom vast, The earth, God's throne, and e'en all things And all the Father is and has.
